summary: Partial shutdown started Jan 31, House expected to vote Feb 2 to reopen. Google Trends at peak 100 on Feb 2.
content: Timeline: Partial government shutdown began 12:01 AM Jan 31, 2026. Senate passed deal 71-29 on Jan 30. House returning Feb 2 (Monday) with Rules Committee at 4pm, votes at 6:30pm. Expected to pass and reopen government quickly. Google Trends for 'government shutdown 2026' spiked from ~5 in mid-Jan to 100 on Feb 2 - absolute peak. DHS funding still unresolved (2-week stopgap). But the acute shutdown crisis should resolve within days. After resolution, search interest historically drops rapidly. However, DHS negotiations described as 'really, really hard' - could keep some elevated interest. But 100 is the absolute max - it's almost certain to decrease from peak.
